touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn connection request sent to Theo Turner, VP of Sales at SolarCube. No response received.
Follow-up LinkedIn message to Theo Turner highlighting call recording and sales coaching capabilities. No response.
Third LinkedIn outreach to Theo Turner referencing healthcare IT sales team challenges. No response.
Cold email sent to Theo Turner introducing our sales enablement platform and requesting 15-minute intro call. No response.
Cold call attempt to Theo Turner. Left voicemail mentioning call coaching for healthcare sales teams. No callback.
Follow-up email to Theo Turner with case study from similar healthcare IT company. No response.

Initial qualification call with Theo Turner. Discussed SolarCube's sales team structure and current challenges with rep performance visibility. Theo mentioned they have 23 reps and are looking for call recording plus coaching capabilities. Scheduled follow-up.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your interest in call recording and coaching right now?
questions_asked.answer: We've grown the sales team quickly and need better visibility into rep performance and deal quality.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native Salesforce integration for automatic call logging and deal insights.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Theo with pricing overview for 23 seats and calendar link for discovery call. Theo responded positively and booked time.
next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: Email to Theo with pre-discovery questionnaire and agenda. Theo confirmed he'd review before the call.

questions_asked.question: Will we need to involve our IT team for implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Setup is typically sales-led, but we'll coordinate with IT for SSO if needed.

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Theo Turner exploring current sales process and pain points. Discussed team size, typical deal cycle, and coaching workflow. Theo mentioned wanting to improve new rep ramp time.

questions_asked.question: What does your current coaching process look like?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly ad-hoc. Managers try to shadow calls but it's inconsistent across the team.

questions_asked.question: How are you currently tracking deal quality?
questions_asked.answer: Mainly through Salesforce notes and manager gut feel. Not very systematic.

next_steps: Theo to share org chart and key stakeholders
Schedule follow-up to discuss use cases in detail

touches.ai_summary: Second discovery call with Theo diving into specific use cases: onboarding automation, call libraries, and performance dashboards. Theo mentioned needing to involve CEO Liam Hall and technical evaluator Camila Carter.

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to be involved in evaluating this?
questions_asked.answer: Our CEO Liam will want to see this, and Camila Carter from my team will need to test it with actual calls.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize coaching scorecards for our methodology?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, scorecards are fully customizable to match your sales framework.

next_steps: Theo to introduce Camila for technical evaluation

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call covering integration requirements, security protocols, and data handling. Theo asked about implementation timeline and ongoing support model.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Standard setup is 2-3 weeks including training. Most teams are fully live within a month.

questions_asked.question: How does support work after we're live?
questions_asked.answer: You get a dedicated CSM plus 24/7 technical support and quarterly business reviews.

questions_asked.question: Are there any compliance requirements we should be aware of for healthcare?
questions_asked.answer: HIPAA compliance is important but calls are about our product, not patient data.

next_steps: Prepare for technical evaluation with Camila

touches.ai_summary: Call with Theo to confirm stakeholders and evaluation process. Discussed timeline pressure as they want to launch by next quarter. Theo mentioned budget is approved in principle.

questions_asked.question: What's your ideal timeline to make a decision?
questions_asked.answer: We'd like to launch by start of next quarter, so need to decide within 3-4 weeks.

questions_asked.question: What's the approval process look like on your end?
questions_asked.answer: I have budget authority but Liam likes to review any new tools. Should be straightforward.

next_steps: Set up exec briefing with Liam

touches.ai_summary: Planning call with Theo to coordinate technical evaluation and executive briefing. Discussed success criteria and evaluation scorecard. Theo confirmed Camila and two Account Managers (Luna Pham and Camila herself) will participate.

questions_asked.question: What will make this evaluation successful from your perspective?
questions_asked.answer: Camila needs to see it work with real calls, and we need clear ROI on coaching time saved.

questions_asked.question: Are you evaluating any other solutions?
questions_asked.answer: We looked at a few options earlier but narrowed it down. You're our primary focus right now.

next_steps: Technical eval scheduled with Camila and team

touches.ai_summary: Email to Theo confirming technical evaluation details and sending prep materials for Camila. Theo confirmed the team is ready and looking forward to testing the platform.

Technical evaluation session with Camila Carter and Account Managers Luna Pham. Walked through call recording upload, AI analysis, coaching scorecard creation, and reporting dashboard. Team tested with 5 actual sales calls. Camila was impressed with transcription accuracy and coaching insights.

questions_asked.question: Can we bulk upload historical calls for analysis?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we support bulk upload and can process your existing call library.

questions_asked.question: How accurate is the AI on industry-specific terminology?
questions_asked.answer: The model learns from your calls and you can add custom terminology to improve accuracy.

questions_asked.question: Can managers create custom coaching playlists for their teams?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, playlist curation is a core feature for coaching workflows.

objections: Concerned about adoption if the UI is too complex for reps to use daily
next_steps: Camila to share feedback with Theo

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call with Theo Turner to review pricing for 23 seats with automation and consulting package. Discussed $24,550 list price. Theo mentioned budget constraints and asked about discount options.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on pricing if we commit to annual?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can work with you on annual commitment pricing. Let me put together options.

questions_asked.question: What's your budget target for this initiative?
questions_asked.answer: We were hoping to keep it closer to $18-20k for the first year.

objections: Pricing is higher than initial budget allocation
next_steps: Prepare revised proposal with pricing options

touches.ai_summary: Second proposal call with Theo reviewing adjusted pricing scenarios. Discussed value justification and ROI calculation for coaching time savings. Theo asked for final pricing before involving Liam.

questions_asked.question: If we can get to your budget range, what's the approval timeline?
questions_asked.answer: If the numbers work, I can get Liam's sign-off within a week and aim to close by month-end.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the consulting package for implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Four weeks of implementation support, custom scorecard setup, and manager training sessions.

next_steps: Send final proposal at $18,300 ACV (25% discount)

touches.ai_summary: Executive briefing with CEO Liam Hall and Theo Turner. Presented strategic value, competitive positioning, and implementation roadmap. Liam asked about success metrics and onboarding plan for the sales team.

questions_asked.question: How do we measure success in the first 90 days?
questions_asked.answer: We track adoption rate, coaching sessions completed, and rep performance improvement against baseline.

questions_asked.question: What happens if adoption is low?
questions_asked.answer: Our CSM works closely with your team on adoption and we have proven change management playbooks.

questions_asked.question: Do you have any other tools you're evaluating alongside this?
questions_asked.answer: No, Theo's done the research and this is our pick. Just need to finalize terms.

next_steps: Liam to review proposal with finance
Target close date end of month

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Theo Turner originally scheduled but rescheduled due to Theo's conflict. Brief discussion on contract terms and payment schedule before rescheduling.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: We can structure quarterly payments with a small adjustment to the discount.

next_steps: Reschedule negotiation call for later this week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Theo with revised payment terms options and contract draft for review. Theo acknowledged receipt and said he's reviewing with Emma Rao from RevOps on procurement side.

Pricing negotiation call with Theo Turner finalizing contract terms at $18,300 ACV with quarterly payments. Discussed start date, onboarding schedule, and CSM assignment. Theo mentioned Emma Rao may have questions on contract terms.

questions_asked.question: Can we add a 30-day out clause in case adoption doesn't meet expectations?
questions_asked.answer: We can include a satisfaction review at 90 days, but typically don't do out clauses on annual deals.

questions_asked.question: Is there anything else blocking signature on your end?
questions_asked.answer: Just need Emma from procurement to review the terms, then we should be good to go.

objections: Requested more flexible cancellation terms for risk mitigation
next_steps: Target signature by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Theo confirming final contract terms and sending to Emma Rao for procurement review. Theo confirmed they're targeting signature this week to hit Q1 launch timeline.
